sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80787" key="pentekaiei/kosi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πεντεκαι-είκοσι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">αἱ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n80787.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">twentyfive</tr_>, better divisim <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πέντε καὶ εἴκοσι</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
